anchor.description: World-day 0 is day 1 of the Eutaxian (post-Severance) calendar: 1 Monarchē, Year 1. Every in-world calendar records its epoch_offset as the number of days its own day 1 sits from here (negative if it predates the Severance).

calendars.name: yavanna
calendars.note: The Eutaxian / post-Severance calendar (361 days, 19x19). Defines the anchor: epoch_offset 0.
